biological_replicate: we collected tumor samples from 33 PDAC patients.
technical_replicate: anti-CD47 nanobody (200 μg per mouse) and an equal volume of saline were administered via tail vein injection.
experimental_design: the animals were randomized into Exo and Saline groups.
factor_value: the anti-CD47 nanobody achieved a more effective therapeutic outcome in tumors with CCT6A knockdown.
number_of_fractions: exosomes (1 × 1010 particles per 100 μL) were injected every three days.
